subject: Ticketek New Zealand Purchase Confirmation
text:
Dear Oli,

Thank you for your purchase.

Ticketek New Zealand Purchase Confirmation

Event: Fleetwood Mac Tribute Night
Venue: TSB Arena
Date: Saturday 7 June 2025

1 x Reserved Seat — NZD 89
Total: NZD 89

If you have any questions please contact us at https://www.ticketek.co.nz/help

Thank you,
Ticketek New Zealand
